description.zh: 把 23×14 的大厦拆成四块施工区：20×10、20×4、3×10、3×4。算完局部房间再合并总数，用能亲手盖起来的面积模型理解多位数乘法与乘除互逆。
description.en: Split a 23×14 tower into four build zones: 20×10, 20×4, 3×10 and 3×4. Solve each area, combine the rooms, and use a buildable area model to understand multi-digit multiplication and inverse division.
